name: GitHub

composio_registry_match.name: GitHub
composio_registry_match.description: GitHub is a code hosting platform for version control and collaboration, offering Git-based repository management, issue tracking, and continuous integration features

description: A cloud-based hosting service for version control and collaboration, allowing developers to store and manage their code.
notes: GitHub has highly mature REST and GraphQL APIs, massive ecosystem support, and a pre-existing official MCP server.
